ksa_text: Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting technical approach, results, limitations, and production readiness assessment.

dcwf.top_element_label: Design, develop, and implement AI tools and techniques to achieve organizational objectives.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-018 (AI and Machine Learning/Task) scores 0.478 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.478) and is edge_case for the Data Valuation Analyst role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for analyst-level Data Valuation Analyst.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.478), and AI and Machine Learning handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI/ML competencies for Data Valuation Analyst at analyst level?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI/ML overlap appears in 15-40% of Data Valuation Analyst postings depending on seniority. Core signals: 0. OOS signals: 0.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. AI/ML content without sufficient core signals is not market-supported for Data Valuation Analyst. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. AI/ML content without sufficient core signals is not market-supported for Data Valuation Analyst. Final decision: exclude.
